disclaimer: ILLUSTRATIVE BACKTEST. Representative recent market-moving events replayed through the live analyst + risk engine, scored against approximate asset moves, net of MEXC futures taker fees. These are NOT actual live paper trades; market_move_pct values are representative, not tick-exact.

events.author: Bureau of Labor Statistics
events.title: US CPI comes in at 4.2% YoY vs 3.1% expected
events.content: Hotter-than-expected inflation print implies a more hawkish Fed; risk assets sell off.
events.note: Hot CPI -> risk-off. Short BTC captured the drop.

events.author: Reuters
events.title: Oil jumps as Iran ceasefire breaks down, strikes resume
events.content: Renewed conflict in the Gulf revives the geopolitical risk premium in crude.
events.note: Escalation -> long OIL. Supply-risk premium returns.

events.author: Reuters
events.title: US bans NVIDIA H100 chip exports to China
events.content: Commerce Department restriction removes a material NVDA revenue segment.

events.author: SEC
events.title: SEC approves the first spot Solana ETF
events.content: A spot SOL ETF opens institutional access; historically bullish for the underlying.
events.note: ETF approval -> long SOL, TP hit.

events.author: Federal Reserve
events.title: Fed cuts rates 50bp and signals further easing
events.content: A dovish surprise weakens the dollar and lowers real yields; gold rallies.

events.author: Bloomberg
events.title: China opens antitrust probe into Alibaba's cloud unit
events.content: Fresh regulatory pressure on a core growth business weighs on BABA.
events.note: China probe -> short BABA; small move, near breakeven after fees.

events.author: CoinDesk
events.title: Weekly on-chain analytics recap published
events.content: Routine data roundup with no fresh catalyst.
